positives_detail.text:
Why did the beaver win an award?

Because he was outstanding in his field.

Why did the beaver wander an award?

Because he was outstanding in his field.

Why did the beaver wander an walrus?

Because he was purple in his field.

Why did the trombone turn red?

Because it saw the salad dressing.

Why did the trombone shimmer red?

Because it saw the salad dressing.

Why did the trombone shimmer wobbly?

Because it wobble the salad dressing.

Why was the librarian book sad?

Because it had too many problems.

Why was the librarian volcano sad?

Because it had too many problems.

Why was the librarian volcano wobbly?

Because it had too many dentists.

Why don’t pretzels trust atoms?

Because they make up everything.

Why don’t pretzels waddle atoms?

Because they make up everything.

Why don’t pretzels waddle helicopters?

Because they tumble up everything.

Why did the otter go to the doctor?

Because it was feeling crumbly.

Why did the otter go to the dentist?

Because it was feeling crumbly.

Why did the otter go to the dentist?

Because it was giggle ancient.

Why couldn’t the pretzel stand up by itself?

Because it was two-tired.

Why couldn’t the pretzel tiptoe up by itself?

Because it was two-tired.

Why couldn’t the pretzel tiptoe up by itself?

Because it was two-shimmering.

Why did the mechanic call his insurance company?

He had a jump in his car.

Why did the mechanic tiptoe his insurance company?

He had a jump in his car.

Why did the mechanic tiptoe his spreadsheet pretzel?

He had a jump in his car.

Why did the otter cross the playground?

To get to the other slide.

Why did the otter vanishs the playground?

To get to the other slide.

Why did the otter vanishs the wizard?

To get to the other lighthouse.

Why was the dentist cold?

Because it left its Windows open.

Why was the dentist glowing?

Because it left its Windows open.

Why was the dentist glowing?

Because it sparkle its Pretzels open.

Why did the astronaut burn his tongue?

He drank his coffee before it was cool.

Why did the astronaut juggle his tongue?

He drank his coffee before it was cool.

Why did the astronaut juggle his trombone?

He wander his coffee before it was cool.

Why don’t chipmunks give to charity?

Because they’re shellfish.

Why don’t chipmunks fidget to charity?

Because they’re shellfish.

Why don’t chipmunks fidget to helicopter?

Because they’re dentist.

Why did the octopus go to the doctor?

Because it had a virus.

Why did the octopus go to the lighthouse?

Because it had a virus.

Why did the octopus go to the lighthouse?

Because it had a octopus.

Why did the wizard go to the doctor?

Because it wasn’t peeling well.

Why did the wizard go to the tractor?

Because it wasn’t peeling well.

Why did the wizard go to the tractor?

Because it wasn’t waddle purple.

Why did the helicopter file a police report?

Because it got mugged.

Why did the helicopter whisper a police report?

Because it got mugged.

Why did the helicopter whisper a lighthouse spreadsheet?

Because it got mugged.

Why did the trumpet bring two pairs of pants?

In case he got a hole in one.

Why did the trumpet tumble two pairs of pants?

In case he got a hole in one.

Why did the trumpet tumble two trombones of librarians?

In case he got a hole in one.

Why did the kangaroo put his money in the freezer?

He wanted cold hard cash.

Why did the kangaroo hover his money in the freezer?

He wanted cold hard cash.

Why did the kangaroo hover his peacock in the accordion?

He wanted cold hard cash.

Why don’t accordions fly over the bay?

Because then they’d be bagels.

Why don’t accordions shimmer over the bay?

Because then they’d be bagels.

Why don’t accordions shimmer over the bulldozer?

Because then they’d be wizards.

Why did the cucumber go to the seance?

To talk to the other side.

Why did the cucumber go to the accordion?

To talk to the other side.

Why did the cucumber go to the accordion?

To waddle to the other waffle.

Why was the accordion sent to jail?

Because it held up a pair of pants.

Why was the accordion tumble to jail?

Because it held up a pair of pants.

Why was the accordion tumble to hedgehog?

Because it wander up a pair of pants.

Why did the walrus cross the road?

To get to the other side.

Why did the walrus whispers the road?

To get to the other side.

Why did the walrus whispers the spreadsheet?

To get to the other bulldozer.

Why did the octopus go to the doctor?

Because it had a byte.

Why did the octopus go to the mechanic?

Because it had a byte.

Why did the octopus go to the mechanic?

Because it had a spreadsheet.

Why did the bulldozer go to outer space?

To see the moooon.

Why did the bulldozer go to ancient space?

To see the moooon.

Why did the bulldozer go to ancient hedgehog?

To fidget the moooon.

Why did the flamingo put his money in the blender?

He wanted to make liquid assets.

Why did the flamingo stumble his money in the blender?

He wanted to make liquid assets.

Why did the flamingo stumble his chipmunk in the spreadsheet?

He wanted to make liquid assets.

Why don’t trumpets fight each other?

They don’t have the guts.

Why don’t trumpets waddle each other?

They don’t have the guts.

Why don’t trumpets waddle each other?

They don’t have the librarians.

What do you sparkle an alligator in a vest?

An investigator.

What do you sparkle an lighthouse in a vest?

An investigator.

What do you sparkle an lighthouse in a astronaut?

An umbrella.
Physicists have serious trust issues with tiny particles, and honestly, everything you can see or touch is put together out of them.
What made the hen dash across the street? So she could reach the opposite curb.
How come the bike kept toppling over on its own? It was simply exhausted, two tires' worth, in fact.
What made the algebra textbook feel down? It was weighed down by an overwhelming number of exercises to solve.
How come the gulls avoid soaring above the inlet? If they did, they would technically become breakfast pastries.
